scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node && bun build src/analyst.ts --outfile dist/analyst.js --target node && bun build src/cli/ops.ts --outfile dist/ops.js --target node && bun build src/cli/ops-ai.ts --outfile dist/ops-ai.js --target node && bun build src/cli/live-analyze.ts --outfile dist/live-analyze.js --target node && bun build src/cli/risk-report.ts --outfile dist/risk-report.js --target node && bun build src/cli/shadow-eval-report.ts --outfile dist/shadow-eval-report.js --target node && bun build src/cli/confidence-calibration-report.ts --outfile dist/confidence-calibration-report.js --target node && bun build src/cli/funnel-optimize.ts --outfile dist/funnel-optimize.js --target node && bun build src/cli/monte-carlo-report.ts --outfile dist/monte-carlo-report.js --target node && bun build src/cli/walk-forward-backtest.ts --outfile dist/walk-forward-backtest.js --target node && bun build src/cli/sync-history.ts --outfile dist/sync-history.js --target node && bun build src/cli/discovery-sync.ts --outfile dist/discovery-sync.js --target node && bun build src/cli/backfill-news.ts --outfile dist/backfill-news.js --target node && bun build src/cli/backfill-news-scraper.ts --outfile dist/backfill-news-scraper.js --target node && bun build src/cli/weekend-optimize.ts --outfile dist/weekend-optimize.js --target node && bun build src/cli/backtest.ts --outfile dist/backtest.js --target node && bun build src/cli/backtest-snapshots.ts --outfile dist/backtest-snapshots.js --target node
